essential.name: Create Restore Point
essential.description: Creates a system restore point before applying optimizations. Allows reverting changes if needed.

essential.name: Delete Temporary Files
essential.description: Removes Windows temp files, cache, and unnecessary content. Can free several GB of space with no drawbacks.

essential.name: Clear Prefetch Data
essential.description: Clears prefetch folder. Windows will rebuild this automatically. Helps with startup optimization.

essential.name: Clear Thumbnail Cache
essential.description: Removes thumbnail cache database. Frees space and fixes thumbnail display issues.

essential.name: Clear Windows Update Cache
essential.description: Clears old Windows Update files. Can free significant space with no negative impact.
args: Stop-Service -Name wuauserv -Force; Remove-Item -Path C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution\Download\* -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service -Name wuauserv

essential.name: Disable Telemetry
essential.description: Disables Windows diagnostic data collection. Reduces network traffic and improves privacy.

essential.name: Disable Activity History
essential.description: Prevents Windows from tracking your activity. Improves privacy with no performance loss.

essential.name: Disable Consumer Features
essential.description: Stops automatic installation of promoted apps. Reduces bloatware and saves bandwidth.

essential.name: Disable Location Tracking
essential.description: Prevents location tracking by Windows and apps. Improves privacy and saves battery.

essential.name: Disable Unnecessary Startup Apps
essential.description: Disables non-essential startup programs. Significantly speeds up boot time.
args: Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_StartupCommand | Where-Object {$_.Name -notmatch 'SecurityHealth|OneDrive'} | ForEach-Object { $name=$_.Name; reg add 'HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\StartupApproved\Run' /v "$name" /t REG_BINARY /d 030000000000000000000000 /f 2>$null }

services.name: Set Services to Manual
services.description: Sets non-essential Windows services to manual startup. Services start on-demand. Reduces RAM usage and background processes.

services.name: Disable Superfetch/SysMain
services.description: Stops preloading apps into memory. Recommended for SSD users. Reduces disk activity.

services.name: Optimize Search Indexing
services.description: Limits indexing to essential locations only. Reduces disk usage while keeping search functional.

services.name: Disable Windows Search Service
services.description: Disables search indexing service entirely. Reduces background disk activity. Search will be slower.

services.name: Disable Background Apps
services.description: Prevents apps from running in background. Reduces RAM and CPU usage significantly.

services.name: Disable Delivery Optimization
services.description: Stops P2P Windows Update sharing. Reduces network and disk usage with no drawbacks.

services.name: Disable Remote Registry
services.description: Stops remote registry access service. Security improvement with no drawbacks for most users.

services.name: Disable Sensor Services
services.description: Disables sensor monitoring services. Most desktops don't have sensors. Saves resources.

services.name: Disable Diagnostic Tracking
services.description: Stops diagnostic data collection services. Improves privacy and reduces background activity.

services.name: Set Storage Service to Manual
services.description: Disables automatic storage optimization. You can run it manually when needed.

services.name: Disable Print Spooler (if no printer)
services.description: Stops print service if you don't have a printer. Saves RAM and improves security.

services.name: Disable Bluetooth (if not used)
services.description: Disables Bluetooth services if you don't use it. Saves power and resources.

services.name: Disable Fax Service
services.description: Disables legacy fax service. Almost nobody uses this anymore.

performance.name: Enable Game Mode
performance.description: Optimizes resource allocation for gaming. Prioritizes CPU/GPU for active application.

performance.name: Enable Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling
performance.description: Enables GPU hardware scheduling (requires compatible GPU). Reduces latency and improves FPS.

performance.name: Disable Xbox Game Bar
performance.description: Disables Game Bar overlay. Reduces resource usage during gaming.

performance.name: Disable Game DVR
performance.description: Turns off background recording. Can improve FPS in games by 5-10%.

performance.name: Enable Fullscreen Optimizations
performance.description: Keeps fullscreen optimizations enabled for better gaming performance.

performance.name: Disable Power Throttling
performance.description: Prevents Windows from throttling background apps. Better for desktop performance.

performance.name: Optimize Visual Effects
performance.description: Reduces animations while keeping Windows looking good. Improves responsiveness.

performance.name: Disable Transparency Effects
performance.description: Removes transparency from taskbar and Start menu. Slight performance improvement.

performance.name: Reduce Menu Show Delay
performance.description: Makes menus appear instantly. Interface feels more responsive.

performance.name: Disable Mouse Acceleration
performance.description: Removes mouse acceleration for more precise control. Preferred by gamers.

performance.name: Disable Memory Compression
performance.description: Disables Windows 11 memory compression. WHEN TO USE: Systems with 16GB+ RAM where compression overhead isn't needed. WHEN NOT TO USE: Systems with 4-8GB RAM where compression helps manage limited memory by reducing page file usage. Trade-off: Uses less CPU but requires more physical RAM.

performance.name: Enable LAPIC Timer (High-Precision Timer)
performance.description: Enables hardware-based LAPIC timer instead of dynamic timers. WHEN TO USE: Gaming and demanding applications where reduced input lag matters. WHEN NOT TO USE: Laptops or systems where power saving is a priority. Trade-off: Improves system stability and reduces lag, but disables dynamic tick power saving (higher power consumption).

performance.name: Disable Dynamic Tick (Tickless Mode)
performance.description: Disables dynamic tick to maintain constant timer interrupts. WHEN TO USE: Gaming/workstation PCs where consistent performance matters more than power efficiency. WHEN NOT TO USE: Laptops or systems where battery life is important. Trade-off: More consistent performance and lower latency, but higher power consumption and reduced battery life.

privacy.name: Disable Cortana
privacy.description: Disables Cortana assistant. Frees CPU and RAM resources.

privacy.name: Disable OneDrive Auto-start
privacy.description: Prevents OneDrive from starting automatically. Saves resources if you don't use cloud sync.

privacy.name: Disable Widgets (Win11)
privacy.description: Removes widgets from taskbar. Saves RAM and reduces background processes.

privacy.name: Disable Advertising ID
privacy.description: Removes personalized advertising ID. Apps can't track for targeted ads.

privacy.name: Disable Feedback Requests
privacy.description: Stops Windows feedback notifications. Cleaner experience with no drawbacks.

privacy.name: Disable Suggestions
privacy.description: Removes app suggestions from Start Menu. Cleaner interface.

privacy.name: Disable Tips and Tricks
privacy.description: Stops Windows tips notifications. Less distractions.

privacy.name: Disable Web Search in Start
privacy.description: Start Menu only searches local files. Faster and more private.

privacy.name: Disable Recent Items Tracking
privacy.description: Stops tracking recently opened files. Privacy improvement.

privacy.name: Disable Automatic File Backup
privacy.description: Disables Windows automatic backup (File History & OneDrive). Stops automatic backups to local drives and cloud. Prevents backup prompts and notifications. You can still backup manually when needed.

privacy.name: Disable Clipboard History Cloud Sync
privacy.description: Keeps clipboard history local only. Better privacy.

advanced.name: Disable Hibernation
advanced.description: Removes hiberfil.sys file. Can free space equal to your RAM size.

advanced.name: Optimize Page File
advanced.description: Configures page file for better performance. Adjusts size based on your RAM.
args: $cs=Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem; if($cs.AutomaticManagedPagefile){ $cs | Set-CimInstance -Property @{AutomaticManagedPagefile=$false} }; $ram=[math]::Round($cs.TotalPhysicalMemory/1GB); $min=$ram*512; $max=$ram*1024; $pf=Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_PageFileSetting -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($pf){ $pf | Set-CimInstance -Property @{InitialSize=$min;MaximumSize=$max} } else { New-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_PageFileSetting -Property @{Name='C:\pagefile.sys';InitialSize=$min;MaximumSize=$max} }

advanced.name: Disable Reserved Storage
advanced.description: Frees 7GB reserved by Windows 11 for updates. More usable space.

advanced.name: Disable NTFS Last Access Time
advanced.description: Stops recording last access time on files. Reduces disk writes on SSD.

advanced.name: Disable 8.3 File Names
advanced.description: Disables legacy DOS naming. Minor performance improvement.

advanced.name: Create Telemetry Firewall Rules
advanced.description: Blocks telemetry at network level. Comprehensive privacy protection.
args: $domains=@('vortex.data.microsoft.com','watson.telemetry.microsoft.com','telemetry.microsoft.com'); foreach($d in $domains){ try{ $ips=(Resolve-DnsName -Name $d -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress}).IPAddress; if($ips){ New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "Block $d" -Direction Outbound -RemoteAddress $ips -Action Block -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }catch{} }
undo_args: Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName 'Block *.microsoft.com','Block vortex.data.microsoft.com','Block watson.telemetry.microsoft.com','Block telemetry.microsoft.com' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-NetFirewallRule

advanced.name: Disable Network Throttling
advanced.description: Removes bandwidth limits on multimedia. Better streaming performance.

advanced.name: Disable Nagle's Algorithm
advanced.description: Reduces network latency for gaming. Better for real-time applications.
args: $b='HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces'; Get-ChildItem $b | ForEach-Object { New-ItemProperty -Path $_.PSPath -Name TcpAckFrequency -Value 1 -PropertyType DWord -Force | Out-Null; New-ItemProperty -Path $_.PSPath -Name TCPNoDelay -Value 1 -PropertyType DWord -Force | Out-Null }
undo_args: $b='HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces'; Get-ChildItem $b | ForEach-Object { Remove-ItemProperty -Path $_.PSPath -Name TcpAckFrequency -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-ItemProperty -Path $_.PSPath -Name TCPNoDelay -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

advanced.name: Optimize TCP Settings
advanced.description: Configures TCP for better performance. Improves download/upload speeds.
args: netsh int tcp set global autotuninglevel=normal; netsh int tcp set global rss=enabled; netsh int tcp set global ecncapability=enabled

advanced.name: Disable Meltdown/Spectre Mitigations
advanced.description: Removes CPU vulnerability patches for ~30% better performance. Only if you understand the security risk.

advanced.name: Disable Windows Error Reporting
advanced.description: Stops automatic crash reporting. Reduces background activity.

advanced.name: Disable Remote Assistance
advanced.description: Disables remote help features. Security and performance improvement.
